data.name: Big Breasted Milky Mommies 7
data.detailed_description:
Relax, lay back, and pick a puzzle.

Solve over 100 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. You choose the difficulty: easy to *hard*!

In this game you will:

1. Play over 100 unique, beautiful Mommy puzzles.

2. Be able to choose the difficulty of your puzzle (how many pieces)

4. Have thousands of hours of sexual, arousing fun with these gorgeous Mommies
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Relax, lay back, and pick a puzzle. Solve over 100 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. Have thousands of hours of sexual fun with these EXTREMELY NSFW Mommy Puzzles.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Dual Core or similar
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 570 / ATI HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz Tri Core or similar
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 870 / AMD R9 270
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
